div.h1: From Comparison to Position: movemask + ctz

p.strong: O(1) Position Finding in SIMD String Operations

div.p: Each step is a single hardware instruction:

ol.li: bsf - 3 cycles (find first set bit) Total: ~7 cycles regardless of string length

ul.li: Best case: O(1) if null at position 0
Worst case: O(n) for long strings
Branch mispredictions on random data SIMD: Always O(1) per 16-byte chunk!

div.p: Data-dependent logic without branches Instead of branching on each comparison: c if (s[i] == '\0') return i; // branch!
We convert to bitmask and compute position: c mask = _mm_movemask_epi8(cmp); return __builtin_ctz(mask); // no branch!
One predictable branch at the end, not N branches.
Extract high bit from each byte:
Count Trailing Zeros: Find index of lowest set bit
